Hwy 101 at Elwha Clinic, Washington 98363, USA

At least two pear trees in parking lot islands of Lower Elwha Health Clinic, other apple and fruit trees in/along edge of parking lot. Ask Clinic before harvesting Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: September-October.
